settings.heading: 1. Agreement
settings.body: A contract is considered entered into when you have accepted the quote in writing or completed a purchase in our online store.

settings.heading: 2. Price and payment
settings.body: Prices are stated in SEK incl. VAT. Online purchases are paid via Shopify Checkout (Klarna, card, Swish, Apple Pay, Google Pay).

settings.heading: 3. Delivery and installation
settings.body: Installation is carried out by VARMA Energy according to the agreed schedule. ROT deduction is applied directly to the invoice.

settings.heading: 4. Right of withdrawal
settings.body: Consumers have a 14-day right of withdrawal under the Distance Contracts Act. The right of withdrawal does not apply to installed products.

settings.heading: 5. Warranty
settings.body: We provide a 5-year installation warranty as well as the manufacturer's product warranty.

settings.heading: 6. Complaints
settings.body: Complaints are handled in accordance with the Consumer Sales Act. Contact info@varmaenergy.se.

settings.heading: 7. Disputes
settings.body: Any dispute will be resolved under Swedish law. Consumers may refer the matter to the National Board for Consumer Disputes (ARN).

settings.intro: These terms apply between VARMA Energy AB and you as a customer when purchasing products and installation services.

settings.heading: Start saving already this spring
settings.description: Installations are now being booked for May. Book a free home visit today and get a fixed price within 48 hours.
